title: campanula balcanica subf. justiniana
intro: Campanula balcanica subf. justiniana, also known as Balkan bellflower, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the bellflower family that is native to the Balkan Peninsula. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Campanula balcanica subf. justiniana include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and fighting off infections, as well as potentially lowering blood pressure and improving cardiovascular health. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in topical applications to treat skin conditions and wounds.
